candidate_problems.text: What specific architectural components are sufficient to turn token prediction from a proposal mechanism into part of a genuine conjecture-criticism knowledge-generating system, rather than a more elaborate remix pipeline?
Under what conditions does criticism applied to LLM-generated candidates actually increase explanatory quality rather than merely selecting for human-legible plausibility?

Can a system built from predictive components generate hard-to-vary explanations in domains where training data contains no near-precedent, or does it remain bounded by historically represented conceptual moves?
